heading: Mid-Atlantic Regional Commission.1So in original. The period probably should not appear.1
label: 15735 Mid-Atlantic Regional Commission.1So in original. The period probably should not appear.1

children.heading: .—Delaware
children.label: 1 .—Delaware
children.text: Each county in the State of Delaware.

children.heading: .—Maryland
children.label: 2 .—Maryland
children.text: Each county in the State of Maryland that is not already served by the Appalachian Regional Commission.

children.heading: .—Pennsylvania
children.label: 3 .—Pennsylvania
children.text: Each county in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania that is not already served by the Appalachian Regional Commission.
